<html lang="zh-CN"><head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>毕业纪念</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background-color: #f0f0f0;
        }
        header {
            background-color: #333;
            color: #fff;
            padding: 20px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        nav {
            background-color: #666;
            padding: 10px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        nav a {
            color: #fff;
            text-decoration: none;
            padding: 5px 10px;
        }
        nav a:hover {
            background-color: #999;
        }
        main {
            padding: 20px;
        }
        img {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        footer {
            background-color: #333;
            color: #fff;
            padding: 10px;
            text-align: center;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <header>
        <h1>靖小2018级3班 毕业纪念</h1>
    </header>
    <nav>
        <a href="#home">首页</a>
        <a href="#list">班级成员</a>
        <a href="#yan">留言</a>
    </nav>
    <main>
        <h2 id="home">首页</h2>
<div>
    <style>
        p, h3 {
            display: inline;
            margin: 0; 
        }
    </style>
	<p>愿我们的友谊</p><h3>天长地久</h3><p>！</p>
<br><p>还记得我们</p><h3>第一次</h3><p>踏进校门</p>
<br><h3>第一次</h3><p>写作业</p>
<br><h3>第一次</h3><p>被老师批评</p>
<br><h3>第一次</h3><p>第一次“借鉴”作业</p>
<br><h3>第一次</h3><p>第一次偷吃零食</p>
<br><video controls="" autoplay="" name="media"><source src="http://m701.music.126.net/20240310123822/96c8e50e416452a15d570a9e039889a6/jdymusic/obj/wo3DlMOGwrbDjj7DisKw/15034075542/c647/d3c9/8fc7/32fb4298bd19851b9730ba313e7cb2f9.mp3" type="audio/mpeg"></video>
</div>
        <img src="https://cdn1.easylink.cc/9t7dwx_download.webp?e=1709958495&amp;token=J_WyMIdhZtwb0E0QHWRqEfQrd5lVSWLffl9QxaxP:emEca7GP3JS1JKfiFNElcZKgHlI=">
<div>
        <h2 id="list">班级成员</h2>
        <p>赵常宏<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>张宇硕<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>杨文博<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>金姿含<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>冯跃<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>王书瑶<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>徐洋<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>冯悦桐<br>李梓冉<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>宋婉冰<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>张哲铭[未获得准许]<br>杨明雪<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>杨依辰<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>牛艺璇<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>张思琪[未获得准许]<br>张恒瑞<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>马钰骁<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>王艺霏<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>单过<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>吁磊<img src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>王雨欣<br>白晗钰<br>陈梓涵<br>刘宇栋<br>申雨萱<br>刘可昕<br>俞帅君<br>谢雨彤<br>田奕绫<br>张贯桀<br>徐可馨<br>冯旭东<br>王雅涵<br>毛浩晨<br>白玉<br>张宸宇<br>彭钰涵<br>李立家<br>杨依辰</p><br>
        <h3>以下是已转学的</h3>
        <br><p>刘建宇<br>李瑞宇<br>张宸溪</p>
    </div>

<div>
<h2 id="yan">留言栏</h2>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>留言栏</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }
        #messageBoard {
            width: 400px;
            margin: 20px auto;
        }
        input[type="text"],
        textarea {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            border: 1px solid #ccc;
            border-radius: 3px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        #messages {
            margin-top: 10px;
        }
        .message {
            border: 1px solid #ccc;
            padding: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
    </style>


    <div id="messageBoard">
        <input type="text" id="nameInput" placeholder="你的名字？">
        <textarea id="messageInput" placeholder="输入留言，禁止刷屏"></textarea>
        <button onclick="postMessage()">发布留言</button>

        <div id="messages"></div>
    </div>

    <script>
        window.onload = function() {
            var savedMessages = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("messages")) || [];
            savedMessages.forEach(function(message) {
                displayMessage(message);
            });
        };

        function postMessage() 
            var name = document.getElementById("nameInput").value.trim();
            var message = document.getElementById("messageInput").value.trim();
            
            if (name === "" || message === "") {
                alert("请输入您的名字和留言内容！");
                return;
            }
            if (message.length > 500) {
                alert("留言内容不能超过500字！");
                return;
            }
            
            var newMessage = { name: name, message: message };
            
            var savedMessages = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("messages")) || [];
            savedMessages.push(newMessage);
            localStorage.setItem("messages", JSON.stringify(savedMessages));
            
            displayMessage(newMessage);
            
            document.getElementById("nameInput").value = "";
            document.getElementById("messageInput").value = "";
        }

        function clearMessages() {
            localStorage.removeItem("messages");
            var messageBoard = document.getElementById("messages");
            messageBoard.innerHTML = "";
        }

        function displayMessage(message) {
            var messageElement = document.createElement("div");
            messageElement.classList.add("message");
            messageElement.innerHTML = "<strong>" + message.name + "：</strong>" + message.message;
            var messageBoard = document.getElementById("messages");
            messageBoard.appendChild(messageElement);
        }
    </script>
</div>


</main>
    <footer>
        © 2024 毕业纪念<br><!--开发者 冯悦桐<br>图片贡献 赵常宏 马钰骁 -->
    </footer>


</body></html>
